description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a predominantly white exterior. The structure includes two visible stories, with a flat roof and large rectangular windows that provide ample natural light. The front facade showcases a recessed entryway with a single door, flanked by a small porch area supported by simple columns and a balcony above. The house sits on a dark base platform, contrasting with the white walls and brown ground plane. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some windows extending around corners and others set deeply into the facade. The overall appearance is minimalist, with little ornamentation and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, and large asymmetrical windows. Features a recessed entryway, balcony, and minimalist geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch with columns, balcony above, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the balcony, side windows, and the depth of the building's geometric forms.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, minimal window openings, and the building's rectangular massing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid wall, balcony structure, and the continuation of the flat roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed single door with a small porch, simple columns, and balcony above; minimal decorative elements.
